payload: The audit tool now has good signal-to-noise ratio. Next improvement: add automated column-reference extraction from Python SQL strings that checks ALL SET/SELECT/WHERE column references against the migration schema (not just INSERT columns). This would catch Pitfall #20 more reliably.
Add a pre-deploy hook that runs audit_source.py and prevents deployment if critical findings exist. Integrate with the .deploy_trigger mechanism.

Investigate the remaining infrastructure issues from previous cycle: (1) PostgreSQL connection failing in production (in-memory fallback), (2) Stale deployed code (whale-suggestions auth bypass). These cannot be fixed from the sandbox — they require Zeabur redeployment.
